de.name: Tägliches Cockpit-Briefing
de.description: Geschäftsleitungs-Tagesbriefing — Forderungen, Liquidität, Auftragsbestand, strategische Risiken — täglich um 07:00.

prefill.name: Tägliches Cockpit-Briefing
prefill.description: 3-4 wichtigsten Geschäftsleitungs-Themen für den Tag — Forderungen, Liquidität, Auftragsbestand.

angles: Agent-Automation Health: pending Jobs aller Agenten — was hängt, was wartet auf Operator-Eingriff?

en.name: Daily Cockpit Briefing
en.description: Management daily briefing — receivables, liquidity, order backlog, strategic risks — every day at 07:00.

prefill.name: Daily Cockpit Briefing
prefill.description: Top 3-4 management topics for today — receivables, liquidity, order backlog.

angles: Open receivables / top debtor (dunning level + amount)
Order backlog & throughput (released / under clarification / blocked)
Agent automation health: pending jobs across all agents — what's stuck, what needs operator intervention?
Strategic risks & seasonal topics (e.g. quarterly closings due)
Top customer status (revenue-critical accounts with anomalies)
